The '''Scitrok''' was a weapon used by warrior-monks known as [[Scitrok Warriors]]. It resembled a fierce scimitar with barbed spikes along the cutting edge and required about ten [[Standard year/Legends|years]] to master in combat, since it was difficult to handle to the point that one may have easily injured himself doing so.

==Appearances==
*{{WEGCite|story=The Prize: A Scout Adventure|book=Galaxy Guide 8: Scouts}}
